title: OCI IAM Rapid Configuration Changes (Anomaly Detection)
description: Detects users making a high volume of IAM changes in a short time window. A burst of identity changes (policy updates, user creation, group modifications) from a single principal may indicate account compromise or insider threat. Uses frequency analysis with threshold (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Forecasting/Anomaly Detection method).
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Event Type' like 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.*' | stats count as iam_changes by 'User Name', 'Source IP' | sort -iam_changes | where iam_changes > 10
falsepositives: Terraform or IaC applying bulk configuration
